item.name: Sauger
item.description:
Revered by the Hhetsarro, this wavekin migrates across Xak Tural to lay its eggs in waters anew.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This migratory fish traverses the extensive waterways of Xak Tural in time with the seasons. Some nomadic Hhetsarro revere this wavekin as a spirit guide, following it hither and thither on its unceasing journey.
